## Description
Provide a concise summary of the changes introduced by this pull request. If it fixes an open issue, link to it here (e.g. `Fixes #12`).

## Type of Change
Please check the options that are relevant:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (non-functional changes)

## How Has This Been Tested?
Describe the steps and environment you used to test your changes. Include details about:
- Your local environment config
- Manual verification steps performed
- Tests run (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project
- [ ] My changes generate no new compile or type-checking warnings
- [ ] I have self-reviewed my own code
- [ ] I have updated/added documentation where necessary

## Visual Screenshots (if applicable)
If you made changes to the UI, please attach screenshots or screen recordings demonstrating the flow.
